title: fragaria vesca var. grandiflora
intro: Fragaria vesca var. grandiflora, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a variety of wild strawberry native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its large and showy white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. grandiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
